title: lippia herbacea
intro: Lippia herbacea, also known as Mexican mint, is a perennial herb native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lippia herbacea include its ability to reduce fever, soothe digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Lippia herbacea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
